MINI MINUTES:

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Default Judgment Pursuant to HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11488.5(b) IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: PAMELA UNDERWOOD, ESQ. for People of the State of Califoria, petitioner and moving party, appearing telephonically, Chole Mosqueda, paralegal also present; LAURENCE JEFFREY LICHTER, ESQ. for Hung Dickinson, respondent and opposing party.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, and Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
